title: Daoist Canon: Lu Dongbin: Hundred Character Stele (Section 5)
description: From the Daoist Canon: Lu Dongbin: Hundred Character Stele
introduction: From the Daoist Canon: Lu Dongbin: Hundred Character Stele

translation.text: From the Lu Dongbin: Hundred Character Stele of the Daoist Canon: One of the foundational scriptures of Chinese Taoism, preserving teachings on internal alchemy, meditation, ritual, and the cultivation of immortality.
